zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Catherine Astley於從1440年到1445年出生在英國諾福爾可梅爾敦 康斯特勃時，她的父親John Astley Esq.23歲，母親Elizabeth Wychingham29歲。她於大約1460年與John Calthorpe在英國諾福爾可梅爾敦 康斯特勃結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年之後在英國諾福爾可布拉肯利。

nameMeanings.name: Astley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places in England called Astley (in Lancashire, Shropshire, Warwickshire, Worcestershire, and Yorkshire), from Old English ēast ‘east’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. The modern surname seems to be particularly associated with the one in Warwickshire. See also Astle .

variants.name: Astle
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire called Astle, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + hyll ‘hill’. There may also have been some confusion with Asthall and Astley . Or occasionally this may be a topographic name denoting residence on an ‘east hill’ (from Middle English ast + hill or hull), i.e. a hill to the east of a settlement.
English: perhaps also a habitational name from Astwell, Northamptonshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + wielle ‘spring’.
English: habitational name from Asthall, Oxfordshire, from Old English ēast ‘east’ + halh ‘nook’.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Catherine Astley was born from 1440 to 1445, in Melton Constable, Norfolk, England, her father, John Astley Esq., was 23 and her mother, Elizabeth Wychingham, was 29. She married John Calthorpe about 1460, in Melton Constable, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 1503, in Blakeney, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Catherine Astley est née du 1440 au 1445, à Melton Constable, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John Astley Esq., avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wychingham, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé John Calthorpe environ 1460, à Melton Constable, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 1503, à Blakeney, Norfolk, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Catherine Astleyがから1440年まで1445年にイギリスノーフォルクメルトン コンスタブルで生まれた時，父John Astley Esq.は23歳，母Elizabeth Wychinghamは29歳であった。約1460年にイギリスノーフォルクメルトン コンスタブルでJohn Calthorpeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1503年以後にイギリスノーフォルクブラケンエイで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Catherine Astley(이)가 1440년 부터 1445년 까지 영국 노르폴크 멜턴 콘스타블일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Astley Esq.(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Wychingham(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1460년 영국 노르폴크 멜턴 콘스타블일에서 John Calthorpe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 이후 영국 노르폴크 블레이켄이에서 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Calthorpe aproximadamente 1460, em Melton Constable, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1503, em Blakeney, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Catherine Astley родилась с 1440 по 1445 в местности мелтон кунстабл, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John Astley Esq. было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wychingham, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Calthorpe около 1460 г. в местности мелтон кунстабл, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 1503 г. в местности блеикини, норфолк, Англия.
